items.briefing:
Australia's media and communications regulator, ACMA, has announced its 2026–27 compliance priorities with a focus on protecting consumers from online harms and scams. Australian organisations — including registered training organisations — should be aware that regulatory scrutiny is increasing around how they handle consumer-facing communications and data.

Separately, cybercriminals are increasingly targeting education technology software suppliers rather than schools directly, meaning your organisation's third-party tools and platforms could be an entry point for attacks. **Practical tip:** Review the software and online platforms your organisation uses for training delivery, and check that suppliers have current security practices in place.

featured.title: ASD to retire Essential Eight within two years, consults on replacement
featured.quote: Australia's cybersecurity framework is fundamentally changing with Essential Eight retirement.
